== Notes for [[Item:Q103233|Q103233]] ==

*[http://www.jewishgen.org/Rabbinic/journal/weil2.htm#F20 '''Descendants of R. Jakob ben Yehuda Weil] (c 1385 - 1456)
*[http://www.jewishgen.org/Rabbinic/journal/weil5.gif Family Tree Chart]
https://www.familysearch.org/tree/person/details/GDZ9-X2S

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000093671018821

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
